name: repo-health-doctor
title: Repository Health Doctor
summary: Run a deterministic repository check and ask an agent for a bounded repair only when evidence is actionable.

inputs.name: check_command
inputs.description: Trusted repository health command that prints status/evidence JSON.

schedule.rationale: Run explicitly after checkout, upgrade, or CI failure.

evidence.name: health-check
evidence.description: Structured status and diagnostic evidence emitted by the repository-owned checker.

expected_artifacts.name: run-journal
expected_artifacts.description: Durable execution and effect audit trail.

safety.rationale: External checks decide completion; the agent receives no authority to weaken or skip them.
safety.secrets: The checker must redact secrets before emitting evidence.
